steps.title: Name the specific initiative
steps.content: The sentence first refers to an important new initiative and then gives that initiative's title, Timeline of African American Music. A colon correctly introduces the specific name after the general noun phrase.

steps.title: Reject sentence breaks
steps.content: A leaves two noun phrases together without punctuation. C creates a sentence fragment after the period. D uses a semicolon between a noun phrase and its name, but semicolons link independent clauses. The answer is B.
